_comment: Hardcoded base attack/defense ratings for the 3 WC 2026 host nations. These nations don't play WC qualifiers and have no recent competitive stats data on our SportMonks plan. Values are research-backed approximations (see README 'Host Nation Approach' section). The standard HOST_BONUS multiplier from config.py applies on top of these values via the normal pipeline logic. Updated: 2026-06-01.

United States.reasoning: FIFA #14. Talented roster (Pulisic, Adams, McKennie, Balogun) but inconsistent — Gold Cup 2025 final loss to Mexico, Copa América 2024 group exit. Roughly average WC team.
United States.form_summary: Lost 2025 Gold Cup final to Mexico 1-2. Group stage exit Copa America 2024. 4th place CONCACAF Nations League 2024-25.

Mexico.reasoning: FIFA #15. Strongest of the three hosts. Won 2024-25 CONCACAF Nations League AND 2025 Gold Cup. Jimenez in form, defensive solidity their strength.
Mexico.form_summary: Won 2025 Gold Cup beating USA 2-1 in final. Won 2024-25 Nations League. Drew Portugal and Belgium March 2026 friendlies.

Canada.reasoning: FIFA #28-30. Historic high under Marsch. Reached Copa América 2024 semifinals (4th). Jonathan David, Davies. Step below USA/Mexico in established quality.
Canada.form_summary: 4th place Copa América 2024. Lost to Mexico in 2025 Nations League semifinal. Highest-ever FIFA ranking achieved 2025.
